expectations.text: Explicitly states current git state has diverged, references the mismatch
expectations.evidence: 'Git state has diverged... Recorded: git_commit: 332ce7e... Current: HEAD is cba44d2... 1 commit ahead' plus git log/git show evidence cited.

expectations.text: Explicitly notes docs/notes.md no longer exists
expectations.evidence: 'The handoff's only listed artifact, docs/notes.md, no longer exists... confirmed via ls/find... and via the commit diff.'

expectations.text: Does not proceed with original plan as-is; surfaces divergence before acting
expectations.evidence: Adjusts the plan, explicitly flags the 'notes folded in' commit message as unverified/suspicious, asks before proceeding.
'Shall I proceed with rewriting src/pagination.py... or would you like to adjust the approach first?'
